candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Cleaner primary current-debt line on balance sheet and explicitly excludes leases, matching baseline STD definition.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the clean current debt total that explicitly excludes capitalized leases. Did not also select 'LT Debt Mat within 1 Year' to avoid double counting, since it appears to represent the same item historically.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment

candidates.row_label: Disposal of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposal flow, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct PPE stock line 'Property, Plant and Equipment, Net'. Included 'Total Tangible Assets, Gross' as secondary historical fallback only if the net PPE label is unavailable in some periods.
